data.title: 国际服课程表新增区域「Red Winter Federal Academy」
data.summary: [New Lesson Area] Sensei, the 10/18 Update has added a new area, 'Red Winter Federal Academy' to the
data.body:
[New Lesson Area]

Sensei, the 10/18 Update has added a new area, 'Red Winter Federal Academy' to the Lessons, and the maximum Lesson Tickets you can have has been increased to 7 tickets.

#BlueArchive![ciDVeRkCxRYwDb9z0IDF16ow4WWIQMwP.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/ciDVeRkCxRYwDb9z0IDF16ow4WWIQMwP.jpg)
